profiles.name: OSSF Scorecard
profiles.local_fallback: Run the local supply-chain pack checker and review workflow action pinning, branch protection policy, dependency policy, and CODEOWNERS without calling the hosted repo.
risk_notes: Requires a hosted repository URL and network access.
May inspect GitHub-hosted repo state; do not run from default local verification.

profiles.name: OSV Scanner
profiles.local_fallback: Keep dependency update policy/dashboard current and run repo-native lockfile or package-manager audit commands only when approved by the downstream repo.
risk_notes: Vulnerability lookups require external advisory data.
Do not fail default verification when the scanner is not installed.

profiles.name: Trivy filesystem scan
profiles.local_fallback: Run repo-kit secret policy checks, workflow pinning checks, and generated-artifact ignore checks; defer vulnerability database scans until Trivy cache/network access is approved.
risk_notes: Scanner database updates usually need network access.
Secret findings require manual review before broad sharing.

profiles.name: SBOM generation
profiles.host_capability_check: Get-Command syft, cyclonedx-py, cyclonedx-gomod, or cyclonedx-npm
profiles.local_fallback: Document SBOM intent in docs/SECURITY_SUPPLY_CHAIN_PACK.md and track missing generator adoption as an upgrade-plan warning.
risk_notes: Generated SBOM outputs can be large; store under archive/local-reports or release artifacts unless intentionally tracked.
Tool-specific package coverage varies by language ecosystem.
